reviews.review_description: Game is Silence and Silence us game (Being honest here with no bias this game plays like scary baboon mixed with cube runners. The movement of scary baboon is good but the ingenuity of cube runners with all the gamemodes makes this game peak. Silence, my friend, Don't stop working on this game. It has its bugs but the gameplay makes up for it. See you February 9th my friend and yeah, I recommend this game. PEANUT TAG IS decent...)

This game is cool and fun and I feel like more people should start playing 
This 
Game
The game is the absolute best and if I could get mod dm me my name on discord is jimbobvr with the animal company face so dm me and give me mod if I can get it
THIS IS THE BEST GAME EVER I HOPE THIS GAME GETS MORE PEOPLE PLAYING IN IT ANYTHING U ASK FOR CAN BE ADDED IN THIS GAME. I LOVE THIS GAME!!! haxxyvr
